query: WITH latest_er AS (SELECT er2.id, er2.project_consultant_id, er2.total_true_cost, er2.eval_rank, er2.can_rank, er2.quoted_design_fee, er2.design_scope_gap_cost, er2.true_design_fee, er2.quoted_supervision_fee, er2.supervision_gap_cost, er2.adjusted_supervision_fee FROM cpa_evaluation_results er2 INNER JOIN (SELECT project_consultant_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM cpa_evaluation_results GROUP BY project_consultant_id) mx ON er2.id = mx.max_id) SELECT pc.id, pc.consultant_id, pc.status, cm.legal_name, cm.code as consultant_code, ler.total_true_cost, ler.eval_rank as result_rank, ler.can_rank FROM cpa_project_consultants pc JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id LEFT JOIN latest_er ler ON ler.project_consultant_id = pc.id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 90001 ORDER BY COALESCE(ler.eval_rank, 999), pc.created_at;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute WITH latest_er AS (SELECT er2.id, er2.project_consultant_id, er2.total_true_cost, er2.eval_rank, er2.can_rank, er2.quoted_design_fee, er2.design_scope_gap_cost, er2.true_design_fee, er2.quoted_supervision_fee, er2.supervision_gap_cost, er2.adjusted_supervision_fee FROM cpa_evaluation_results er2 INNER JOIN (SELECT project_consultant_id, MAX(id) as max_id FROM cpa_evaluation_results GROUP BY project_consultant_id) mx ON er2.id = mx.max_id) SELECT pc.id, pc.consultant_id, pc.status, cm.legal_name, cm.code as consultant_code, ler.total_true_cost, ler.eval_rank as result_rank, ler.can_rank FROM cpa_project_consultants pc JOIN cpa_consultants_master cm ON cm.id = pc.consultant_id LEFT JOIN latest_er ler ON ler.project_consultant_id = pc.id WHERE pc.cpa_project_id = 90001 ORDER BY COALESCE(ler.eval_rank, 999), pc.created_at;
